title: Request rate
description: Requests per second across all demo API pods.

title: 5xx error rate
description: Server errors per second for the demo API.

title: Error percentage
description: Percent of demo API requests returning 5xx errors.

title: P95 latency by namespace
description: 95 percent of requests are faster than this value, grouped by tenant namespace. The namespace label makes the Prometheus result easier to read than plain {}.

title: Status code breakdown
description: Request rate grouped by HTTP status code.

title: Scrape target health
description: Shows whether Prometheus can scrape demo API targets. 1 is up, 0 is down.
